description_long: This marble sculpture depicts two life-sized human figures, one with large, detailed wings and the other draped in classical attire. The winged figure, likely representing an angel or allegorical spirit, extends a laurel wreath above the head of the other, who appears to be a male hero or athlete. Both figures are rendered with realistic anatomical detail, flowing garments, and expressive postures. The base is rectangular and solid, supporting the dynamic composition above. The surface is smooth with subtle textural variations in the hair, feathers, and drapery. The overall impression is one of triumph and honor, with the figures closely interacting in a celebratory gesture.
description: A detailed marble sculpture of a winged figure crowning a male figure with a laurel wreath, both standing on a rectangular base. The work features realistic anatomy, flowing drapery, and finely carved wings.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures' faces, the winged figure's outstretched arm with the laurel wreath, and the male figure's forward stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the wings, the drapery's folds, and the profile of both figures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span of the wings, the back of the male figure, and the intricate details of the garments.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the curvature of the wings, the back of the winged figure, and the flowing robes.
attribute_subject_matter: winged figure crowning a male figure with a laurel wreath
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
